brand.name: Sabiosphere
brand.tagline: Shape Your Space, Shape Your Life.

hero.title:
Your Plot. Your Dream.
Zero Compromise.
hero.subtitle: Build your home with India's most trusted tech-enabled construction partner. Get 100% material tracking, fixed timelines, and zero cost overruns.

principal.title: Meet the Principal
principal.name: Architect Mansi Rajgarhia
principal.bio: , the Founder & Principal Designer of Sabiosphere Studios, is a visionary designer who crafts spaces with purpose, passion, and precision.
principal.quote: Great design begins with listening. I stay deeply involved from start to finish, ensuring every space not only fulfills my client's needs but also remains a masterpiece that stands the test of time with minimal changes.

budgets.title: Home Construction Cost Per Sqft
budgets.subtitle: Average residential construction costs in Delhi range from ₹1,250 to ₹4,500 per sqft depending on the quality of finishes.

items.name: Premium Finishing

features: Designer teak doors and window finish

videoReview.quote: Our experience with Sabiosphere was pleasurable because of the project managers. The work got done before 45 days just the way we wanted it to be.
videoReview.author: Swati and Gaurav

disclaimer.prefix: By submitting, you agree to our
disclaimer.suffix: , allowing us to use your information as outlined.

whyUs.title: Why Sabiosphere?
whyUs.intro: Choosing Sabiosphere means partnering with a team that brings expertise, innovation, and dedication to every project. We combine artistic vision with practical functionality to deliver spaces that not only look stunning but also serve their intended purpose perfectly.

items.title: Expert Team
items.description: Our experienced designers and craftsmen bring years of industry expertise to every project.

items.title: Tailored Solutions
items.description: We create custom designs that perfectly match your vision, lifestyle, and specific requirements.

items.title: Quality Guaranteed
items.description: From premium materials to meticulous craftsmanship, we ensure excellence in every detail.

items.title: Vastu Compliant
items.description: We design thoughtful spaces tailored for clients who value Vastu principles.

process.title: Our Process
process.subtitle: From the first conversation to the final walkthrough, every step is handled with care.

steps.title: Site Meeting
steps.description: Understanding your needs, timeline and budget.

steps.title: Concept Discussion
steps.description: Developing ideas to harmonize with your vision.

projects.title: Featured Work
projects.subtitle: Crafting spaces that spark awe—whether it's where you live, create, or connect.

items.name: Dr. Maanik
items.quote: We wanted a space that suits both the clinic and home and is in harmony. The most important aspect for us was the aesthetic, given the nature of our profession—a skin clinic. Sabiosphere team accomplished this perfectly. We were genuinely amazed by Mansi's way of thinking, as she showed a completely different outlook that we hadn't considered before. Keep it up!

items.name: Mr. Akarsh Singhal
items.quote: Our home looks amazing, and we couldn't be happier with the outcome. We had no clear idea of how to design the space, but Mansi and her team guided us every step of the way. They were extremely helpful and paid attention to every little detail. What we especially loved were the color combinations used—they were perfectly balanced, neither too bold nor too subtle.

items.name: Mr. Kailash Yadav
items.quote: Working with Mansi and her team was very smooth. Mansi delivered everything on time and much better than we expected. She constantly checked to ensure every detail aligned with our vision. She was extremely polite and went out of her way to make sure we got what we wanted. I would recommend anyone looking for a reliable designer to reach out to Mansi and her team.

items.name: Mr. Harshit Yadav
items.quote: Overall, it was an excellent experience with Sabiosphere Studios. I am truly impressed by the quality of the handover. The team exceeded my expectations in both design and project execution. Great job, guys! Special thanks to the team for being calm and understanding throughout the process. I highly recommend reaching out to Sabiosphere to plan your space.

items.name: Mr. Vidit Mathur
items.quote: I checked with a lot of designers before finalizing Sabiosphere, and it turned out to be the right decision. They didn't just listen to what I wanted—they understood the feeling I wanted the space to evoke, something I didn't find in most designers. They helped me realize things I hadn't even considered. Thanks to the Sabiosphere team, the process was smooth.

items.name: Mr. Atul
items.quote: I got in touch with Sabiosphere Studios through an online platform – Upwork. I was impressed by their portfolio and the initial concept they presented for my home, which made me hire them. The team understood our situation well and prioritized our project to finish it on time. Addition of Rajasthani elements really stood out in our house elevation. Thank you guys for the great work.

items.name: Mr. Azad Singh
items.quote: If you're planning to design your home, you should definitely talk to Mansi from Sabiosphere. Mansi's suggestions were practical and genuinely aimed at improving the design. She's updated with the latest design trends and, most importantly, made sure our ideas were included in the final look. I strongly recommend getting your home interiors done by her studio.

items.name: Mr. Surya Prakash
items.quote: From our very first meeting, the Sabiosphere team just got us. We wanted a space that felt productive but also had a bit of fun, and they delivered exactly that. The process was smooth, the ideas were creative, and every detail was taken care of. The final outcome matches the vision perfectly—both comfortable and fun. Highly recommend Sabiosphere for office design.

items.name: Mr. Sumeet Meshih
items.quote: Working with Mansi was an absolute pleasure. She was always polite, approachable, and fully involved in every aspect of the project. Her availability and willingness to answer all our questions made the entire experience smooth and enjoyable. We truly appreciated her commitment to ensuring the project went as smoothly as possible, and we couldn't be happier with the results.

items.name: Mrs. Shruti Gupta
items.quote: Mansi's ability to understand and incorporate our specific needs into the design was truly remarkable. She listened carefully to our ideas and preferences, and ensured that every corner was as per our vision. Mansi's consistent communication and keen attention to detail ensured that all our requests were addressed. We are beyond thrilled with the final outcome.

items.name: Mrs. Neelam Kanodia
items.quote: Fantastic service! The entire team was superb. I truly appreciated how they handled the project with professionalism and ensured timely completion. Initially, I was concerned there might be delays like with other turnkey providers, but they stayed true to the timeline. I'm especially happy with the drawer design, it's perfectly designed according to my needs.

videoTestimonials.title: We'll let our clients do the talking
videoTestimonials.subtitle: Here's what they have to say

items.name: Priyanka and Tarun
items.quote: We wanted our new home to look contemporary and modern since we picked up tastes from across travelling the world.

items.name: Kanchan and Sumit
items.quote: The designer's dedication made the place look beautiful and it gets better everyday I enter my home.

items.name: Nidhi and Vikas
items.quote: Sabiosphere was the best collaboration for the modern and contemporary home we wanted.

items.name: Aarti and Rohan
items.quote: From the first meeting to handover, the team kept us informed and the result exceeded our expectations.

bookConsultation.title: The home design you crave
bookConsultation.subtitle: When you give your home the Sabiosphere touch, you get both beauty and functionality. We employ state-of-the-art technology to ensure your home features a flawless look that lasts a very long time.

contact.whatsappMessage: Hi Sabiosphere, I'd like to know more about your interior design services.
